title: Mail
notDetected: Mail stack not detected on this host.

suggestedAlerts.title: Suggested alerts
suggestedAlerts.hint: Quick links to create notification rules for this mail stack. The rule wizard opens on the Notifications page.

serviceDown.label: Mail service down
serviceDown.desc: Alert when a mail daemon (Postfix, Dovecot, …) stops being active on this host.

queueDeferred.label: Mail queue deferred > threshold
queueDeferred.desc: Alert when the Postfix deferred queue depth exceeds a configured count threshold.
